clip_info.annotation_instructions: Add temporal queries below. Each query should have a unique query_id.

annotations.question: When does one of the graspers first let go of the gallbladder?
annotations.notes: Optional: Add notes about this annotation

annotations.question: During which frames are both graspers grasping the gallbladder?
annotations.answer_format: Frames X-Y (or multiple ranges: X-Y, A-B)
annotations.notes: Use multiple ranges if action happens multiple times
